title: Rose Gold Alloy - Tools, Armor and More
description: Introduces Rose Gold, a craftable metal between Iron and Diamond. Adds full tool set and a storage block, with armor and more building blocks coming soon.
body:
# Rose Gold Alloy  
A warm, elegant mid-tier metal for builders, adventurers and enchantment enjoyers.

Rose Gold Alloy introduces a handcrafted metal that sits perfectly between Iron and Diamond.  
It does not generate in the world — you must forge it. By combining Copper, Gold and the crystalline spark of Amethyst, players unlock a new material with style, strength and purpose.

This mod focuses on progression, craftsmanship and a smooth, rewarding mid-game experience.

----------------------------------------------

## What is Rose Gold?

Rose Gold is a refined alloy created by skilled players, not stumbled upon as ore.  
It blends the warmth of copper, the purity of gold and the magical clarity of amethyst into a metal that feels precious but grounded — powerful but not overpowered.

As a tier, Rose Gold fills the gap where Iron starts to feel weak and Diamond feels too expensive to break.  
It emphasizes enchantability, resilience and elegance rather than brute force.

----------------------------------------------

## Current Features (v0.4.1 Beta)

### A New Alloy Recipe  
Craft Rose Gold Ingots using a simple but meaningful combination of:
- Copper  
- Gold  
- Amethyst Shards  

The recipe reflects the alloy’s identity: refined, balanced and crafted with intent.

### Rose Gold Block  
Compress your ingots into a polished, decorative Rose Gold Block — perfect for storage or building stylish interiors and warm-toned structures.

### Full Tool Set + Sword  
Forge a complete set of Rose Gold equipment:
- Sword  
- Pickaxe  
- Axe  
- Shovel  
- Hoe  

Each tool carries the traits of the alloy:
- more durable than Iron  
- highly enchantable  
- reliable and elegant in day-to-day use  
- designed to feel natural in vanilla gameplay  

### Natural Progression  
Because Rose Gold must be crafted, it forms a clean progression line:
Iron → Rose Gold → Diamond  

Unlocking recipes and building your first Rose Gold gear feels like a genuine step forward rather than a shortcut.

----------------------------------------------

## Planned Features

### Full Rose Gold Armor Set  
A warm, polished armor set that offers:
- protection between Iron and Diamond  
- excellent enchantability  
- a distinct visual identity that fits the alloy’s personality  

### Rose Gold Trim Material  
Use a Rose Gold Ingot as a smithing trim material to decorate armor with a soft, warm metallic glow.

### Decorative Blocks  
More Rose Gold building elements are planned, expanding your palette:
- plates  
- bars  
- tiles  
- clean decorative variations  

These will help builders give structures a warm and elegant metallic accent.

### Expanded Crafting & Flavor  
Future updates may explore:
- small utility or aesthetic uses  
- subtle material variations  
- inspirations from real rose gold behavior (polish, sheen, mild patina)  
- community-requested expansions  

----------------------------------------------

## Philosophy

Rose Gold Alloy is designed to feel like a natural part of Minecraft:
- no power creep  
- no tech trees or grind walls  
- no out-of-place mechanics  

Just a beautiful alloy that enriches mid-game progression, gives players more expressive choices and fits seamlessly alongside vanilla metals.

----------------------------------------------

Rise above Iron.  
Don’t rush to Diamond.  
Forge something beautiful in between.

Enjoy Rose Gold Alloy!
